body:
# Description

Create naming validator script.

# [PKT-FND-006](task-0027): Naming Validator Script

## Purpose

Create the naming validator script.

## Scope

- Naming rules
- Validation logic
- Error reporting

## Implementation

1. Define naming rules
2. Implement validator
3. Add error reporting

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Validator checks all rules
2. Errors reported clearly
3. Passes on valid names
